name: Bain Capital Specialty Finance, Inc.
description: Bain Capital Specialty Finance, Inc. is a business development company (BDC) focused on providing customized financial solutions to middle-market companies. The company primarily invests in first lien senior secured loans, second lien senior secured loans, and other debt and equity investments. Managed by BCSF Advisors, LP, an affiliate of Bain Capital Credit, the company leverages the global resources and credit expertise of Bain Capital to source, underwrite, and manage a diversified portfolio of private debt investments designed to generate current income and capital appreciation for its shareholders.
